query: 你给的时间，和我电脑的时间怎么不匹配？

transcript.content: `Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
我已经把这个问题修到根上了。 根因不是 node 路径了，而是状态栏刷新走了完整 GC 判定链路，导致扩展里看起来像“点击没反应 / 刷新失败”。现在我把状态栏和详情窗口改成了 `host-only fast path`：
为什么 codex插件里是 486k，你给的是258k？
因为我这里的监控脚本把窗口上限 `主动 clamp 到了 258k`，而 Codex 插件显示的是它自己上报的 `reported model_context_window`，大约 `486k`。 代码里就是这么写的：
你给的时间，和我电脑的时间怎么不匹配？
现在已经对齐了。 为什么之前不一样： - Codex 插件显示的是宿主真实上报窗口：`486k` - 我这里之前默认把它 `clamp` 到了 `258k`

decision.archive_summary: Earlier block about fixing VS Code context refresh failures appears resolved: initial refresh errors from extension/Node invocation were diagnosed, and a host-only fast path was implemented so status bar/detail refresh no longer ran the full GC decision chain. Current active topic is the mismatch between Codex plugin-reported context size and the assistant/runtime-reported number.
decision.reasoning_summary: Keep t8-t12 raw because the current topic is the reported-number mismatch and the latest user turn depends on that immediate exchange. Evict t1-t7 because that refresh-failure debugging thread appears solved and is now background context rather than active evidence. No durable user preference/fact pin is needed from this transcript.
